title: Exact Rigid Configuration Geometry Checks

solver_reuse.target: rigid configuration bad translation-image and bad distance-table QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Malformed rigid-configuration rows where exact replay computes translated point (4,-2) but a row claims x-coordinate 5, and computes squared distance 9 between (0,0) and (3,0) but a row claims 10.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional rigidity rows only when they add distinct distance-table, isometry, or polynomial-geometry solver pressure; keep graph rigidity and synthetic theorem claims in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode fixed finite point-configuration checks as deterministic exact-rational replay rows.
Replay SAT witnesses through exact pairwise squared-distance evaluation.
Route false translation-image claims through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after exact replay computes the translated coordinate.
Route false distance-table claims through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after exact replay computes the distance.
Keep graph rigidity, synthetic rigidity, and general rigid-motion classification theorems under Lean horizon until formal proof routes exist.
